paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.07, with a 0.25% increase from the prior close and a 32.39% decrease over the last 20 sessions. There have been no new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news articles have discussed the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer, the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns, and the completion of a $375 million convertible senior notes offering.

The recent news articles have been driven by these events, with some articles questioning the company's valuation and governance. The articles have also mentioned the company's expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year and the use of proceeds from the convertible senior notes offering for general corporate purposes. The sources of these articles include Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K filing on July 13, 2026, regarding the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
